hero.title: Welcome to my portfolio website
hero.desc: I create fast, high-quality, and visually engaging web experiences through modern technologies and premium design.
hero.sideDesc1: I create modern, aesthetic, and user-centered interfaces.
hero.sideDesc2: I build clean, understandable, and scalable frontend solutions.
hero.skillsDesc: Technologies I use to build modern and reliable frontend solutions.

about.title: A strategic approach to frontend development
about.desc: I do not just design interfaces. I build universal frontend systems that combine user behavior, business goals, and visual trust. Every section is fast, polished, and optimized for mobile devices.
about.introText: I focus on creating modern, clean, and user-friendly interfaces. In frontend development, I give special importance to responsive design, interactivity, and a professional visual appearance.
cards: I create modern and user-friendly interfaces.
I build fully responsive websites for all devices.
I develop multi-language and multi-page websites.
I create fast and flexible WordPress-based websites.
I build frontend solutions for portfolio and business projects.
I write clean and scalable code.

contentBlocks.title: Modern UI / UX
contentBlocks.text: I create modern, clean, and user-friendly interfaces.

contentBlocks.title: Responsive Layout
contentBlocks.text: I build websites that adapt perfectly to mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.

contentBlocks.title: Multi-language Systems
contentBlocks.text: I create multi-language and multi-page websites with a flexible and scalable structure.

contentBlocks.title: WordPress Solutions
contentBlocks.text: I build fast, ready-to-use, and customizable websites based on WordPress templates and plugins.

contentBlocks.title: Project Ready
contentBlocks.text: I create practical frontend solutions for portfolio, dashboard, business, and corporate projects.

contentBlocks.title: Code Quality
contentBlocks.text: I build frontend solutions based on clean, modular, and scalable code architecture.

portfolio.title: Selected Projects
portfolio.desc: Real frontend and WordPress projects across various fields. Each project focuses on a modern interface, responsive structure, and practical functionality.

items.title: Remstroy
items.text: A multi-page, multi-language, and modern business project. Built on a scalable frontend architecture using Router, TypeScript, and i18n.

items.title: NeftGasProm
items.text: A multi-language premium corporate frontend project. Crafted with a scalable page structure and a modern UI.

items.title: Marocandy
items.text: A ready-made and flexible WordPress project. A convenient solution for brand presentation and content management.

items.title: GreenShop
items.text: A modern React-based web project aimed at showcasing products and improving user experience.

items.title: Novacolor Uzbekistan
items.text: A modern and polished frontend solution with a corporate look. Focused on presenting the brand, products, and services in a premium way.

items.title: Coder Blog
items.text: A blog interface that presents content and articles in a clean and organized way. Features a minimal design and a comfortable reading experience.

items.title: Besnik Pro
items.text: A premium landing page built with beautiful blocks, a well-structured section layout, and reusable frontend components.

items.title: Koreys
items.text: A responsive educational project. Focused on performing well across all screen sizes and presenting content clearly.

items.title: Paint Demo
items.text: An interactive drawing project that runs directly in the browser. Built on Canvas, it offers users a simple and enjoyable drawing experience.

items.title: Quiz Test UZ
items.text: A frontend project built for quizzes and Q&A flows. Enhanced with form validation and a phone input mask.

items.title: Send To Admin
items.text: A frontend project that makes the data submission process simple and intuitive. Form handling and user interaction are at its core.

items.title: CRUD UZ
items.text: A CRUD project with a user-friendly interface for managing data — adding, editing, and deleting records with ease.

items.title: Snake Game UZ
items.text: An interactive Snake game enriched with multi-language support, game modes, bonuses, and statistics.

items.title: Strategik 2048
items.text: A modern frontend take on the classic 2048 puzzle game. Built with a responsive interface and smooth animations.

services.title: Services
services.desc: A core set of services focused on universal frontend development.

items.title: ReactJS Development
items.text: I build fast, clean, and scalable React interfaces.

items.title: UI/UX Implementation
items.text: Turning ready designs into pixel-perfect premium frontend experiences.

items.title: Responsive Web Design
items.text: Perfect adaptability for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.

items.title: Frontend Optimization
items.text: Improving performance, accessibility, and code quality.

items.title: Multi-Language Systems
items.text: I create multi-language, user-friendly and SEO-friendly websites using react-i18next and i18next.

items.title: WordPress Services
items.text: I create modern, fast and easy-to-manage websites on WordPress.

contact.title: Let’s build a strong project together
contact.desc: If you need a premium portfolio, a corporate website, or a universal React-based frontend, feel free to contact me.
